zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Aguillon於大約1222年出生在英國英格蘭素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆時，她的父親Robert de Aguillon38歲，母親Margery Fresney41歲。她於1239年之前與Sir Giles Argentine結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1274年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: Aguillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Jesus, Pablo, Juan, Agustin, Carlos, Ernesto, Manuel, Roberto, Ruben, Santiago.
habitational name from any of several places called Aguillón in Spain (Asturias or Galicia), or Aguillon in Var, France.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Aguillon was born about 1222, in Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Aguillon, was 38 and her mother, Margery Fresney, was 41. She married Sir Giles Argentine before 1239. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1274, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Aguillon est née environ 1222, à Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Aguillon, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margery Fresney, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Giles Argentine avant 1239. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1274, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Aguillon um 1222 in Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Aguillon 38 und ihre Mutter Margery Fresney 41. Sie hat vor 1239 Sir Giles Argentine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1274 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Aguillon(이)가 대략 1222년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Aguillon(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Fresney(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1239년 이전 Sir Giles Argentine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Aguillon родилась около 1222 г. в местности буккхурст би витихам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Aguillon было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Fresney, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Giles Argentine перед 1239 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1274 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.
